## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes (typechecks src **and** tests)
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the changed behavior
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under the `## [Unreleased]` section (for any user-visible change)
- [ ] If bumping the version: `package.json#version` **and** `src/version.ts#SDK_VERSION` are in sync
- [ ] Public API additions are exported from `src/index.ts`
